race.comment: METCALFE (2) is racing in good form and fought on gamely when runner-up over 2450m at Beaudesert last start. This is a tougher contest, but he looks capable of going one better with another honest performance. CLIVE'S GLORY (3) had excuses at Ipswich after struggling around the tight final bend before finishing fourth. The rise to 2000m on this track looks ideal and he shapes as a major player. INSIDE PASSAGE (4) stuck on well along the rail here last time and now gets the blinkers removed for the first time. He drops slightly in grade and has the ability to be right in the finish again. EVADE THE GAME (7) didn't have much go right at Ipswich after racing awkwardly in a slowly run event but still boxed on for fourth. From a better draw she can settle closer and appeals each-way.
